violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. Highest temperature observed when tested was 156.0?F. Be sure to sanitize all dishware in sanitizing solution in 3 compartment sink until dish machine is adjusted to achive 160?F final rinse temperatures.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution. Bleach solution in towel buckets was depleated at time of inspection.
